mapper.sql: id, version_name, version_code, channel, download_url, release_notes, force_upgrade, published, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM app_versions WHERE channel = #{channel} AND published = 1 ORDER BY version_code DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_versions (version_name, version_code, channel, download_url, release_notes, force_upgrade, published, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{versionName}, #{versionCode}, #{channel}, #{downloadUrl}, #{releaseNotes}, #{forceUpgrade}, #{published}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
